basic_details.job_title: Tezpur University Field Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: The Tezpur University (TU) has officially announced the Field Assistant Recruitment 2026 with 4 openings. The detailed notification has been published on the official website, tezu.ernet.in. Candidates below 35 years of age and holding a B.A./ B.Sc. in Linguistics, English, or allied subjects are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 30 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and walk-in interview details are shared below.

age_limit.age_details: Below 35 years of age on the date of interview.
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years as on the date of interview. Age relaxation will be as per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: BA/ B.Sc. in Linguistics/English and Allied subjects.
qualification.details: Field Assistant: BA/B.Sc. in Linguistics/English and Allied subjects. Experience: Desirable: Candidates are expected to carry out tasks of recording speech data in the Field (Nagaland), IPA transcriptions of speech data as and when required, and create basic grammar and phonological structure of the target languages. Native speakers of the target languages possessing basic knowledge of Linguistics will be preferred.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 20,000/- per month (consolidated, excluding the 18% GST amount)
salary_details.details: Field Assistant: Rs. 20,000/- per month (consolidated, excluding the 18% GST amount).

content_sections.heading: Tezpur University Field Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Tezpur University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Tezpur University Field Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Tezpur University Field Assistant Vacancy Details 2026
Tezpur University Field Assistant Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Field Assistant: BA/B.Sc. in Linguistics/English and Allied subjects. Experience: Desirable: Candidates are expected to carry out tasks of recording speech data in the Field (Nagaland), IPA transcriptions of speech data as and when required, and create basic grammar and phonological structure of the target languages. Native speakers of the target languages possessing basic knowledge of Linguistics will be preferred.

content_sections.heading: Tezpur University Field Assistant Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 35 years as on the date of interview. Age relaxation will be as per Government of India rules.

content_sections.heading: Tezpur University Field Assistant Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Field Assistant: Rs. 20,000/- per month (consolidated, excluding the 18% GST amount).

content_sections.heading: Tezpur University Field Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last date for sending advance copy of CV via email

content_sections.heading: Tezpur University Field Assistant Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for Tezpur University Field Assistant Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: Tezpur University Field Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to send the advance copy of the CV?
faq.answer: The last date to send the advance copy of your CV via email is 28th July 2026. This allows the interview board to review your application before the interview.

faq.question: Q2. What is the walk-in interview date for the Field Assistant post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Field Assistant position at Tezpur University is scheduled for 30th July 2026. Candidates are advised to be present on time.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Field Assistant role?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Field Assistant position, candidates must possess a BA or B.Sc. degree in Linguistics, English, or allied subjects. This ensures a foundational understanding of the required fields.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Field Assistant position?
faq.answer: The age limit for candidates applying for the Field Assistant post is below 35 years of age as of the interview date. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Field Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Field Assistant role will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,000/- per month, excluding the 18% GST amount. This is a project-based remuneration.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Field Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Field Assistant position at Tezpur University. This recruitment is for a DRDO sponsored research project.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to appear in person at the specified venue and time with all required documents.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the Field Assistant post?
faq.answer: As per the official notification, there is no mention of any application fee for the Field Assistant post. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original and self-attested photocopies of mark sheets, certificates from 10th standard onwards, caste certificate (if applicable), experience certificate (if any), any other testimonials, a copy of your recent signed Curriculum Vitae (CV), and the application in the prescribed format.

faq.question: Q10. Can outstation candidates attend the interview online?
faq.answer: Yes, in special cases for outstation candidates, a blended mode of interview is available, which may include online participation. It is advisable to confirm this possibility when sending your advance CV.
